# Wiki Overview

> Evolving synthesis of everything in the wiki. Updated by /ingest when sources shift the understanding, and by /update when knowledge changes.

## Current Understanding

*No sources ingested yet. Run `/prefill <domain>` then `/search <topic>` to start building.*

## Key Concepts

*Populated as concept pages are created.*

## Open Questions

*Add open questions here as they arise, or they will be generated by /ideate.*

## Recent Shifts

*Recorded here when /update changes a prior understanding.*
